title: Predictive quota: burn-rate projection
description: 5h:80% does not answer "can I finish this PR?". Burn-rate math (Δutil/Δtime over last hour) → "at current rate you will hit 100% in 47 minutes". Transformative UX from three lines of code.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 2: "Predictive quota. 5h:80% does not answer can I finish this PR? Burn-rate math gives at current rate you will hit 100% in 47 minutes"

acceptanceCriteria: Last ≥3 quota samples per workspace persisted to disk (rolling window)
live.projection5h / projection7d populated in JSON output: { rateUtilPerMinute, etaToFullMinutes }
CLI shows "ETA 47m" in red when <60min; menubar shows same in tile sub-row
No projection shown when fewer than 3 samples — never lie with a single data point
